subject: The Time is Now

**The Time is Now**
* * *
I just returned home from seeing Vice President **Mike Pence** deliver an impassioned case for why America needs tax reform now. And as I've been telling local media and even [CNBC](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7ee0d4aa24&e=1acd9bb3d6) in the past few days, if anyone understands the benefits of tax reform, it's Mike Pence. Indiana is constantly recognized as the nation's leading example of the positive benefits that come with cutting taxes and eliminating burdensome regulations. It's that taxpayer-focused leadership that has made us the fiscal and economic envy of the nation and has made Indiana the center of the political universe yet again this week with the Vice President's visit and _**the announcement that President Donald Trump is coming to Indianapolis on Wednesday evening**_!

These visits have an important purpose, and that is to recognize and highlight that continuum of success, but also to encourage all of you to support federal tax reform so that all Americans can bask in the same kind of good fortune that comes as a result of a simple, fair and competitive tax code. Make sure President Trump and Vice President Pence know you support federal tax reform by [signing the petition here](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e52ac7520a&e=1acd9bb3d6).

\- Kyle Hupfer

(Photo: Chairman Hupfer doing an interview with WISH-TV following Vice President Mike Pence's remarks in Anderson, Indiana, this evening.)
|
---
| | _**Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**_
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| Governor **Eric Holcomb **was back at work in the Hoosier State this week after his economic development trip to Japan. On Monday, he [announced](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7806901f6e&e=1acd9bb3d6) that Dr. **Kristina Box** would be replacing Dr. **Jerome Adams** as the new State Health Commissioner and issued a [statement](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=25ac90d415&e=1acd9bb3d6) regarding the state's bid for the new Amazon HQ2. As you've probably heard by now, Amazon is planning to build a second headquarters somewhere in the U.S. which is expected to bring in $5 billion dollars and up to 50,000 jobs. On Tuesday, the Governor partnered up with KAR Auction Services to [announce](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b90ec19c01&e=1acd9bb3d6) a new $80 million dollar headquarters that will be built in Carmel by 2019. The headquarters is expected to bring 400 jobs to the state. The Governor also attended a celebration at the Toyota Plant in Gibson County on Wednesday where he and First Lady**Janet Holcomb** [bought](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1c2659ccdf&e=1acd9bb3d6) the 5 millionth vehicle made at that plant! On Thursday the state awarded $150 million in local road and bridge funding through the Community Crossings Grant Program to local communities and to wrap up the Governor's busy week, today he joined Congresswoman **Susan Brooks** , Congressman**Luke Messer** and Congressman **Todd Rokita** in welcoming Vice President Pence to Anderson for his remarks on the need for federal tax reform.
---
|
---
|
---
_**State Auditor Tera Klutz Kicks Off Campaign** _ And we're off! On Wednesday,** Tera Klutz **kicked off her 2018 [campaign](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9b2b10e77f&e=1acd9bb3d6) for a full term as State Auditor in Fort Wayne. In doing so, she returned back to where it all started for her, the place where she promoted efficiency and transparency in county government, which is exactly what she's doing in state government. Auditor Klutz has the full support of Chairman Hupfer, who introduced her at the event, and the Indiana Republican Party, as well as Governor Holcomb who said, “Tera Klutz's experience as a certified public accountant, as Allen County's elected auditor and for the last eight months as our auditor of state, have only reassured me that she was and continues to be the best choice to serve as Indiana's chief financial officer. I fully support her campaign and look forward to continuing to work with her for years to come.”
|
---
|
---
| _**Support Graham-Cassidy**_ Tax reform isn't the only crucial issue facing our country today. With Obamacare killing jobs, raising premiums and bringing more and more chaos to health care, the need to repeal and replace is an absolute necessity. Democrat **Joe Donnelly** , of course, doesn't see that necessity. As per usual, he's siding with his D.C. Democrat pals and choosing to embrace Obamacare at all costs, even though Hoosiers have made it clear in election after election that we want it repealed. In the coming days, the U.S. Senate is slated to vote on what’s known as Graham-Cassidy, a health care bill that will repeal the Affordable Care Act and shift power outside of D.C. back to where it belongs...the states. Governor Holcomb, along with 14 other Governors across the Nation have supported the bill, while Democrat Donnelly continues to sit on his hands and do nothing. Give him a call and let him know you stand with President Trump, Vice President Pence, Governor Holcomb, and the millions of Hoosiers who are ready to see Obamacare gone.
---

name: Tom Perez
subject: Meet Doug Jones, Derek:
body:
Help elect Doug Jones in Alabama.
---
**Split a donation between Doug Jones and the DNC to help elect Doug to Congress and Democrats around the country.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523403/4067b0a/3939e5ab0/7e63438f/3516231996/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Doug-Jones-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170923_tp_nd&source=em_20170923_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170923_tp_nd")****
When we say we're investing in every race in every state we mean it, Derek.

In a couple of months, we have an important special election happening in Alabama for Jeff Sessions' open Senate seat -- **[and it's critically important that we do all that we can to get our candidate, Doug Jones, elected.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523403/4067b0a/3939e5ab0/7e63438c/3516231996/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/Doug-Jones-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+and+its+critically+important+that+we+do+&utm_campaign=em_20170923_tp_nd&source=em_20170923_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170923_tp_nd")**

Doug is a lifelong Alabamian who has spent his career fighting for the people of Alabama in and out of the courtroom.

In his first year as the U.S. District Attorney for Northern Alabama, he helped convict two former Klansmen for the murder of four innocent African American girls in the 1963 16th Street Baptist Church bombing.

This is the level of character and dedication that Doug will bring to the U.S. Senate if elected. In times like this one, Alabamians need someone who will fight for them day in and day out -- someone who will go the distance, no matter what it takes.

Split a donation of $3 or whatever you can between the DNC and Doug Jones' campaign to help elect Doug to the Senate and other Democrats up and down the ballot.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be divided evenly between the DNC and Doug Jones for Senate.

clean_body: Help elect Doug Jones in Alabama. Split a donation between Doug Jones and the DNC to help elect Doug to Congress and Democrats around the country. ""** When we say we're investing in every race in every state we mean it, Derek. In a couple of months, we have an important special election happening in Alabama for Jeff Sessions' open Senate seat -- "" Doug is a lifelong Alabamian who has spent his career fighting for the people of Alabama in and out of the courtroom. In his first year as the U.S. District Attorney for Northern Alabama, he helped convict two former Klansmen for the murder of four innocent African American girls in the 1963 16th Street Baptist Church bombing. This is the level of character and dedication that Doug will bring to the U.S. Senate if elected. In times like this one, Alabamians need someone who will fight for them day in and day out -- someone who will go the distance, no matter what it takes. Split a donation of $3 or whatever you can between the DNC and Doug Jones' campaign to help elect Doug to the Senate and other Democrats up and down the ballot. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be divided evenly between the DNC and Doug Jones for Senate. name: Sally Boynton-Brown
subject: FL Dems 2017 State Conference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
Dear friend,

Every two years, the Florida Democratic Party organizes a statewide conference to decide the direction of our party and set the groundwork we need to win. [**That's why we need you there. Click here to get all the information you 'll need.**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bc1e/1a5213b3/71e1c12b/718b7b61/1949197301/VEsH/ "http://www.floridadems.org/conference?utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+Thats+why+we+need+you+there+Click+here+t&utm_campaign=em092317&source=em092317&refcode=em092317")

We're asking you to join us for the Florida Democratic Party 2017 State Conference at Disney's Coronado Springs Resort in Orlando on October 27-29, 2017

**Here's what you need to know:**
> To participate at state conference you will need to purchase a ticket to become a delegate.
> [**To become a delegate, book your hotel and receive the latest conference updates click here >>>**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bc1e/1a5213b3/71e1c12b/718b7b60/1949197301/VEsE/ "http://www.floridadems.org/conference?utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+To+become+a+delegate+book+your+hotel+and&utm_campaign=em092317&source=em092317&refcode=em092317")
>
> To participate in speaker events separate from the conference, you will need to purchase individual tickets.
> [**Tickets for breakfast, luncheon and dinner program >>>**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bc1e/1a5213b3/71e1c12b/718b7b63/1949197301/VEsF/ "http://www.floridadems.org/conference?utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Tickets+for+breakfast+luncheon+and+dinne&utm_campaign=em092317&source=em092317&refcode=em092317")
>
> To become a sponsor, you'll have to select a sponsorship level.
> [**Select your sponsorship >>>**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bc1e/1a5213b3/71e1c12b/718b7b62/1949197301/VEsC/ "http://www.floridadems.org/conference?utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-+Select+your+sponsorship+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em092317&source=em092317&refcode=em092317")
As we approach the 2018 elections, Florida Democrats are poised to flip Florida blue.

Florida Democrats are in a strong position to claim the governorship for the first time since 1994, we are prepared to defend Senator Bill Nelson's U.S. Senate seat, and--for the first time in nearly two decades--we are within striking distance of winning the upper chamber of the state legislature.

We can't win if you don't get involved. We need your voice at state conference to shape the future of our party.

Let's flip Florida blue,

Sally Boynton-Brown
President, Florida Democratic Party

---

| Paid for by Florida Democratic Party. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
---

We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters. Click [**here**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4bc1e/1a5213b3/71e1c12b/718b7b5d/1949197301/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.floridadems.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em092317&source=em092317&refcode=em092317") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages.

Thanks for your support of Florida Democrats!.

Contributions or gifts to the Florida Democratic Party are not tax deductible.

subject: Do you approve, Peter? (health care)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
How would you rate Betsy DeVos' performance as Education Secretary? |
---

| | | Peter,

Joe has made his position clear: He is 100% opposed to Senate Republicans' latest attempt to repeal the Affordable Care Act -- a bill that would gut Medicaid, strip millions of their health care, and send premiums through the roof. _And he will fight like hell to make sure it never becomes law._

But, he needs to know you're with him.

**Let us know: Do you approve of Joe 's opposition to the Graham-Cassidy bill -- Republican's last attempt to repeal the Affordable Care Act?**

subject: We still need one more vote to save Obamacare, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We still don't have the votes to kill Obamacare repeal, team. And Republicans will do anything to take health care from millions of Americans. STOP them >>
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/obamacare-repeal-deadline?refcode=DPE-20170923-DidYouSeeDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Team --

The good news: Senator John McCain has come out in opposition of the Graham-Cassidy bill.

And the bad news: **This bill ISN 'T dead yet. We still need one more vote to kill the bill in its entirety and save Obamacare.**

Mitch McConnell is deploying ALL of his resources to pass a bill that would end Medicaid as we know it, cause costs to skyrocket for working Americans with pre-existing conditions, and leave around 32 million people uninsured.

So we're ramping up our efforts and expanding our ads to call out the GOP for failing the "Jimmy Kimmel test" in key states.

[**Team, will you chip in $1 to help fund our ads and all of our efforts to stand with Senate Democrats in this fight?**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/obamacare-repeal-deadline?refcode=DPE-20170923-DidYouSeeDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Look, until we have the votes to kill this bill, until the deadline for Mitch McConnell to pass repeal with just 50 votes passes on 9/30 -- we can't take ANYTHING for granted.

And that means that we can't sit around twirling our thumbs while Republicans scramble for votes -- we have to go on the offensive.

If grassroots Democrats come together in a big way, we can stop them. But if we sit on the sidelines, Mitch McConnell will take health care from millions.

name: Paul Ryan
subject: Unleashing America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
Friend,

There's no question about it, America is the greatest country in the world.

**But America is great because of its people -- not its government._ _ We just need to unleash our potential. **

How do we do that? With a limited government that reduces taxes and removes regulations.
****
In fact, your House Republicans already rolled back countless Obama-era regulations.**And in the next week, we will release our conservative tax plan that will (1) simplify the tax code and (2) let you keep more of your paycheck.

_One step at a time, w_** _**e are unleashing America.**_

But the Democrats love to assert their control with high taxes and an overly-regulated economy. **Since the battle ahead won 't be easy, I need to know you stand with us. [Do you support lower taxes?](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MzA3MjEyNDES1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEyMjc1NjMxNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

It's not going to be easy -- that's why I need you.

Thank you,

Paul Ryan

Most Americans are poorly informed about basic constitutional provisions, according to a new national survey by the Annenberg Public Policy Center. What we don't know about our common heritage let's those who would divide us do their work.The annual Annenberg Constitution Day Civics Survey finds that:
* More than half of Americans (53 percent) incorrectly think it is accurate to say that immigrants who are here illegally do not have any rights under the U.S. Constitution;
* More than a third of those surveyed (37 percent) can’t name any of the rights guaranteed under the First Amendment;
* Only a quarter of Americans (26 percent) can name all three branches of government. [(Read more from the Annenberg Study)](http://js7y.mjt.)

Shestokas](http://js7y.mjt.lu/lnk/AEIAAEyUEHYAAACVfi4AAAAf3JwAAAAADvAAAAq6AAi0jABZxqpxWxWEzE8VTEeRp9JetgIexgAIQoU/11/MvOhZApzHHuLa-NOwYPZKg/aHR0cDovL3d3dy5zaGVzdG9rYXMuY29tL2Fib3V0LWRhdmlkLWotc2hlc3Rva2FzLw)

This is accomplished in a simple, unbiased, easy-to-read presentation that takes into account the "sound bite" nature of today's cyber-driven, fast-click culture. [ _**Constitutional Sound Bites**_](http://js7y.mjt.lu/lnk/AEIAAEyUEHYAAACVfi4AAAAf3JwAAAAADvAAAAq6AAi0jABZxqpxWxWEzE8VTEeRp9JetgIexgAIQoU/14/prt4_BzEjltI44FxSR9M1A/aHR0cDovL2Ftem4udG8vMnhrc0RBMg) translates an 18th Century message into a 21st Century format. ---
[_**Creating the Declaration of Independence**_](http://js7y.mjt.lu/lnk/AEIAAEyUEHYAAACVfi4AAAAf3JwAAAAADvAAAAq6AAi0jABZxqpxWxWEzE8VTEeRp9JetgIexgAIQoU/18/ZliQrkcWIV0ukH-dFlAMIw/aHR0cDovL2Ftem4udG8vMmZ5eW9SNw) let's you into the minds of Richard Henry Lee, John Adams and Thomas Jefferson in the weeks before July 4, 1776. Experience Lee's trepidation as he knows with his proposal for American Independence he is literally risking beheading. Join Adams and Jefferson at City Tavern as they begin crafting the Declaration and follow the story of how Jefferson came to reluctantly draft the Declaration when few others, including Adams thought that Jefferson's assignment was important. Learn what led Lee to formally propose American independence. Find out how Adams leaned on Jefferson to justify independence to the nations of the world, the soldiers of the Continental Army, and the American people. Sit with Jefferson as he pens history. _**[Creating the Declaration of Independence](http://js7y.mjt.lu/lnk/AEIAAEyUEHYAAACVfi4AAAAf3JwAAAAADvAAAAq6AAi0jABZxqpxWxWEzE8VTEeRp9JetgIexgAIQoU/19/JLPbfTHwiv9717xWWGKN6A/aHR0cDovL2Ftem4udG8vMmZ5eW9SNw) **_also importantly discusses the 55 words, beginning with _"We hold these truths to be self-evident..."_ that became the American Creed and the eight critical words that provide legal legitimacy to the United States: _"the Law of Nature and of Nature's God"_. name: Bernie Sanders
subject: One of our own is running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
Former NAACP President Ben Jealous is one of the great progressive leaders in the United States of America.
#
Sisters and Brothers --
These are, to say the least, unusual and unprecedented times for our country. We have a president who is unfit to hold his office, and whose policies are the most anti-working class in the modern history of America.
One of the ways we can most effectively oppose Trump's right-wing extremism is with strong progressive leadership at the local and state level.
Former NAACP President Ben Jealous is one of the great progressive leaders in the United States of America. He endorsed our campaign when it was difficult. He joined our political revolution at the very moment the political and financial establishment in this country was fighting back hardest against us.
Now he's running for governor of Maryland and it's our turn to be there for him.
[**Please chip in $3 to Ben Jealous ' campaign to serve as the next governor of Maryland. Ben has always been a very powerful ally of our movement, and he needs our support. Please help him.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-ben-jealous?refcode=bs4bj-em170923-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-ben-jealous?refcode=bs4bj-em170923-full")
Ben Jealous knows a truth that we don't see too much of on the television. And that is that there is an enormous amount of pain in this country. He understands that there are millions and millions of people right now who are hurting.
Ben understands that people are not making it on $10 an hour and that we're going to raise the minimum wage to a living wage -- $15 an hour.
Ben understands that in the year 2017, it is unacceptable that women are making 80 cents on the dollar and that we need pay equity.
Ben understands that in a highly competitive global economy, we need the best educated workforce in the world and that it is insane that people cannot afford to go to college or are leaving school deeply in debt.
Ben understands, and this has been his life's work as one of the great leaders of the American civil rights movement, that there is something profoundly wrong when the United States has more people in jail than any other country on earth, and that disproportionately those prisoners are black, Latino and Native American. He has spent decades fighting for real criminal justice reform.
Ben understands, unlike President Trump, that climate change is not a hoax, and as governor of a state that is uniquely threatened by rising sea levels, he is going to work with many of us to transform our energy system to energy efficiency and sustainable energy.
And Ben understands that in the richest country in the history of the world, it is long past time that we join the rest of the industrialized world in ensuring that health care is a right for every single man, woman, and child. That is why he is a strong advocate of a Medicare-for-all, single-payer system.
Lastly, let me say this: I am asking you to donate to Ben's campaign because we want to elect him governor of Maryland. But I am also asking you to donate to his campaign because our participation and Ben's victory will send a very powerful message to candidates all across the country.
And that message is that when you stand up and authentically fight for the working class in this country, when you fight for people of all backgrounds, they will stand up and fight with you. That is how we elect progressives to Congress, to governors' mansions, and to state legislatures across the country.
Ben Jealous has always been with us -- please join me and be there for him today. He needs us.
[**Please chip in $3 to Ben Jealous ' campaign to serve as the next governor of Maryland.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-ben-jealous?refcode=bs4bj-em170923-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-ben-jealous?refcode=bs4bj-em170923-full")
Electing a leader like Ben Jealous would be a tremendous victory not just for our political revolution, but it would demonstrate that our values are on the march everywhere in this nation. That's why your donation means so much.
In solidarity,

Bernie Sanders
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-ben-jealous?refcode=bs4bj-em170923-full "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-ben-jealous?refcode=bs4bj-em170923-full")****
** **
** **
** **
** **

PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). name: action-needed@dscc.org
subject: Why John McCain's vote didn't seal the deal on Obamacare (CNBC)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We can't take any false victory laps on Obamacare, team. Not when CNBC is reporting that aside from McCain, "none of the other potential 'no' votes feel like a lock."
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/obamacare-repeal-deadline?refcode=DPE-20170923-ActionNeed_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
_**CNBC: John McCain's no vote won't necessarily kill Graham-Cassidy health bill**_
Team,

Here's the deal: Taking a victory lap now because of John McCain's announcement could be the very thing that kills Obamacare.

**Why? Because as _CNBC_ reported, "none of the other potential [GOP] 'no' votes feel like a lock."**

[**So we 've got to keep the pressure up, team. Please, pitch in now to keep all of our ads and efforts going to stop repeal >>**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/obamacare-repeal-deadline?refcode=DPE-20170923-ActionNeed_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

And _CNBC_ expands on WHY we can't just rest on McCain's no vote:

> _" Rand Paul voted for the last repeal bill after consistently threatening not to; Lisa Murkowski is reportedly being offered incentives for Alaska to vote yes; and Susan Collins has stayed mostly quiet, so far saying only that she's 'leaning no.'
>
> While McCain's statement makes the bill's chances of passing slimmer, we've learned time and again during this process that it's not over until it's over."_

[**team, we need to show the GOP that grassroots Democrats will deliver consequences to anyone who supports repeal. Can you rush a contribution of $1 to fund our new ads and all our efforts to stand with Senate Democrats in this fight?**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/obamacare-repeal-deadline?refcode=DPE-20170923-ActionNeed_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

McConnell's window to pass repeal with just 50 votes will close by next Sunday.

No one wants to sit down for coffee in a week's time to talk about how he flipped those "leaning no" votes into last-minute yes votes. Not with healthcare for 32 million Americans on the line. Not when it means the end of Medicaid as we know it. And certainly not when it means that pre-existing conditions and lifetime caps would price families and children out of the health care they need.

**Senate Democrats are standing unified in the fight to stop McConnell from taking healthcare from nearly 32 million Americans. But the fight is far from over. Please chip in now to help:**

**[http://www.dscc.org/no-false-victory-laps](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/obamacare-repeal-deadline?refcode=DPE-20170923-ActionNeed_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thanks for standing with us,

Team DSCC

120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dfc1/2b07114c/111fad5d/73146cbe/1441566364/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dfc1/2b07114c/111fad5d/73146cb9/1441566364/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
